title: T-009 — API: Item create (POST /api/technical/items) with V-TEC-01..04 validation
prompt: Implement POST /api/technical/items per §6.2 + V-TEC-01..04. Zod schema validates: item_code unique per org (V-TEC-01), item_code pattern per type (RM<digits>|SALT-XX for rm; WIP-<2-letter-suffix>-<7-digit-sequence> for intermediate; FG<digits> for fg), weight_mode='catch' requires nominal_weight, gross_weight_max and variance_tolerance_pct (V-TEC-02), intermediate requires WIP code pattern (V-TEC-03), d365_item_id unique when set (V-TEC-04). Insert via Drizzle within transaction. Permission gate: technical.items.create. RED tests/api/items-create.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/items-create.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Item create endpoint with full Zod validation per V-TEC-01..04 and RBAC.
pipeline_inputs.details: Zod schema lives in lib/technical/items/schemas.ts. Extension fields validated against reference_schemas (02-SETTINGS) — fetch active schema for items at request time and merge into Zod object. RBAC enforced via permission resolver checking technical.items.create.
acceptance_criteria: Given duplicate item_code for same org, when POST runs, then 409 returned with V-TEC-01 error code.
Given weight_mode='catch' missing nominal_weight, when POST runs, then 422 with V-TEC-02 error.
Given item_type='intermediate' with item_code='RM1234', when POST runs, then 422 V-TEC-03 violation.
Given user lacks technical.items.create, when POST runs, then 403 returned.
test_strategy: RED tests covering each V-TEC-01..04 violation path.
risk_red_lines: Do not perform any D365 pull/push side effects in this endpoint.
